meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Oppo repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Oppo Repair Winnipeg | Find X & Reno Screen Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Oppo repair in Winnipeg. Screen, battery, SUPERVOOC charging repair for Oppo Find X, Reno, A series & Realme devices. Growing market specialists.
page.h1: Oppo & Realme Repair Specialists in Winnipeg
page.heroDescription: From the flagship Find X series to the affordable A-series, we repair all Oppo devices in Winnipeg. Plus Realme phones too! SUPERVOOC charging issues, cracked screens, battery problems—we fix it all.

heroImage.alt: Oppo smartphone repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Replace cracked AMOLED displays on Oppo Find X, Reno, and Realme devices with precision. Repair costs and timelines vary by model and part availability. For less common devices like these, parts availability can differ by model and supplier, but repairs are often still possible after evaluation. Aftermarket parts are only offered when the quality is sufficient to be reliably warrantied.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore battery performance to your Oppo or Realme phone in Winnipeg.

services.name: SUPERVOOC Repair
services.description: Fix SUPERVOOC and VOOC fast charging issues—65W to 150W charging restored.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Repair Hasselblad-partnered cameras on flagship Oppo Find X devices.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Fix Dolby Atmos speakers, earpieces, and audio quality issues.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Repair USB-C ports for reliable fast charging and data transfer.

advantage_pillars.title: Oppo & Realme Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Specialized in the BBK family of brands including Oppo, Realme, and OnePlus devices. Repairs for these devices typically require at least one business day due to part sourcing. If you need a working phone while we complete the repair, loaner phones may be available.

advantage_pillars.title: SUPERVOOC Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Expert repair for 65W to 150W SUPERVOOC fast charging systems. If a repair is outside your budget or parts are not readily available, we can also attempt data recovery to help you retrieve important information.

advantage_pillars.title: Growing Market Leaders
advantage_pillars.description: Early adopters of Oppo repair in Winnipeg, staying ahead of the curve. Most repairs for these devices are reasonably priced, but many customers don't have a baseline for what a repair should cost, so we'll explain options clearly before proceeding.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs. Warranty coverage applies to the part repaired or replaced only and does not extend to unrelated components. If a function cannot be tested prior to repair, its operation cannot be guaranteed afterward.

model_categories.title: Find X Flagships
model_categories.description: Premium flagship repairs with Hasselblad camera expertise.

model_categories.title: Reno Series
model_categories.description: Mid-range Reno repairs with portrait camera specialization.

model_categories.title: Oppo A Series
model_categories.description: Budget-friendly A-series repairs at affordable prices.

model_categories.title: Realme Devices
model_categories.description: Full Realme lineup support—GT flagships to C-series budget phones.

model_categories.title: Foldables
model_categories.description: Specialized foldable screen and hinge repairs.

models_description: We repair all Oppo and Realme devices including Find X flagships, Reno series, A-series, and foldables. Repair cost and part availability can vary between models, even within the same brand.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Oppo and Realme repair costs vary by model—budget A-series devices are affordable, while Find X flagships and foldables cost more due to premium components. Oppo's Canadian support centre provides model-specific troubleshooting and SUPERVOOC charging diagnostics.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that flagship Oppo repairs can cost as much as Samsung or iPhone repairs, especially for Find X and N-series foldables. iFixit's Oppo teardowns reveal the engineering complexity of SUPERVOOC charging systems and foldable hinge mechanisms.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense for your device's value, we'll explain alternatives clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery is often still possible to retrieve your files.

faqs.question: Do you repair Oppo phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're Winnipeg's Oppo and Realme specialists. We service all devices from budget A-series to flagship Find X models at our St. Vital and Garden City locations.

faqs.question: Can you fix SUPERVOOC fast charging issues?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We're experts in SUPERVOOC and VOOC charging repairs—from 65W standard to 150W ultra-fast charging. We diagnose port issues, cable problems, and internal charging components.

faqs.question: Do you repair Oppo foldable phones?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service the Oppo Find N series including the Find N3 and N2 Flip foldables. Specialized hinge and flexible display repairs available.

faqs.question: Are Oppo and Realme parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We maintain stock for popular Oppo and Realme models. Find X flagships and Reno series parts are typically in stock; less common models may take 2-3 business days to source.

faqs.question: Do you repair Realme phones too?
faqs.answer: Yes! Realme is part of the BBK family (along with Oppo and OnePlus), and we're experts in all Realme models from GT gaming phones to budget C-series devices.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
